calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-08-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: V.Mack/M. Vallejo, CSR: LaVon Granger

Petitioner: Yuji Fukumoto present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Eugene Kaneshima
Decree signed in open court.
